2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a test for inter-server COPY operations in NFSv4.2 servers. The test creates a source file on one server and a destination file on another, then issues a COPY_NOTIFY to the source server and a COPY operation to the destination server. The test verifies that the copied data is correct. The test requires a second server to be configured and both servers must support inter-server copy operations.
